creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209436
Patch file for quaterly branch

Hello Jochen,

Thank you for committing. But to merge this quaterly branch both ports r517347 and ports r518387 should have been merged. And currently packaging error is happening in this port of quaterly branch. So would you please do either one of following?

1. Revert ports r518390 and then merge ports r517347 and ports r518387 to quaterly branch.
2. Apply attached patch to quaterly branch.

Best Regards.
